name: Ayeyarwady Region (Myanmar)
description: A light-blue field charged at the centre with the seal of Ayeyarwady Region.
history: Used by the Ayeyarwady Region government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the regional emblem of Ayeyarwady Region, charged in the centre of the tricolour
